silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_sentinel_events_daily
calculation_steps: Start from the bronze sentinel.events table and filter to events ingested in the last 90 days
Normalize event timestamps to a UTC daily snapshot_date and deduplicate events by event_id and ingestion_id per day
Classify each event by alert_state (OPEN/CLOSED) and severity where present and add a daily snapshot row per event

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_siem_alerts_snapshot
gold_table_suggestion.note: Aggregate from silver_sentinel_events_daily to produce a current-state snapshot table (one row per severity/state)

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_sentinel_events_daily
calculation_steps: Start from the bronze sentinel.events table and filter to events with a mapped severity field
Normalize and deduplicate events to daily snapshot rows (one event per event_id per day) in silver_sentinel_events_daily
Emit daily counts grouped by severity and snapshot_date

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_siem_alerts_by_severity
gold_table_suggestion.note: Produce current-state counts by severity from the latest snapshot in silver_sentinel_events_daily

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_sentinel_ingestion_latency_daily
calculation_steps: Start from sentinel.events and compute per-event latency by comparing event_timestamp and ingestion_timestamp at the raw row level
Remove outliers and deduplicate events to maintain one latency measurement per event_id per day
Produce daily aggregated latency metrics (median, 95th percentile) and snapshot_date in the silver table

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_siem_ingestion_latency
gold_table_suggestion.note: Expose current-state ingestion latency percentiles and median for dashboarding

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_audit_log_integrity_daily
calculation_steps: Start from sentinel.events and filter to records labeled as audit or administrative logs
For each audit log event, perform integrity checks: presence of required fields (user, action, timestamp, source) and checksum/hash field if present
Produce a daily rate: count of audit events passing integrity checks divided by total audit events for snapshot_date

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_audit_log_integrity
gold_table_suggestion.note: Provide a single current-state integrity percentage for audit logs derived from silver_audit_log_integrity_daily

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_audit_missing_fields_daily
calculation_steps: Start from sentinel.events and identify audit-related events using event_type or category fields
For each audit event, flag missing critical fields (user_id, action, timestamp, resource_id) and create one row per event per day indicating missing_field_count
Aggregate to daily totals and compute a missing fields rate (events with any missing field / total audit events) per snapshot_date

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_audit_missing_fields
gold_table_suggestion.note: Expose current-state percentage of audit events missing required fields

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_corrupted_logs_daily
calculation_steps: Start from sentinel.events and apply corruption heuristics (invalid timestamp, truncated payload, checksum mismatch) at the raw row level
Mark events as corrupted where any heuristic is triggered and deduplicate to one corruption flag per event per day
Calculate daily corrupted log rate = corrupted events / total events for snapshot_date

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_corrupted_log_rate
gold_table_suggestion.note: Report the current-state percentage of corrupted/invalid logs for operational monitoring

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_vulnerability_unresolved_counts
gold_table_suggestion.note: Aggregate unresolved vulnerability counts by severity and asset from the bronze qualys.vulnerability_instances as a current-state snapshot

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_vulnerability_unresolved_counts
gold_table_suggestion.note: Combine counts from wiz.findings and qualys.vulnerability_instances for a unified unresolved vulnerability snapshot

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_compliance_event_failures
gold_table_suggestion.note: Current-state count of compliance-related scan failures from snyk.scan_findings and wiz.findings

gold_table_suggestion.name: gold_vulnerability_scan_coverage
gold_table_suggestion.note: Compute percentage of known assets with at least one recent vulnerability scan result (current-state) from qualys.vulnerability_instances and wiz.findings
